T001.redEvidence: npm run typecheck failed before setup because the typecheck script was missing.
changes: Added TypeScript source-run dependencies: typescript, @types/node, and jiti.
Added strict no-emit NodeNext tsconfig.json with allowImportingTsExtensions, isolatedModules, erasableSyntaxOnly, and Node ambient types.
Added engines.node >=22.22.2 and package scripts that run typecheck before check and test.
Replaced the extension-entry Pi package type import with a local erasable object type so type checking works without bundling Pi core.
Added a narrow temporary declaration shim for the existing JavaScript harness adapter until that module is migrated.

T002.redEvidence: Added tests/entrypoint-load.test.js; node --test tests/entrypoint-load.test.js failed because index.ts still exported ./src/extension-entry.js and the JavaScript wrapper still existed.
changes: Updated index.ts to re-export ./src/extension-entry.ts with an explicit .ts specifier.
Removed the obsolete src/extension-entry.js JavaScript entrypoint wrapper.
Added tests/entrypoint-load.test.js to verify package pi.extensions, TypeScript entrypoint imports, absence of the JavaScript wrapper, and jiti source loading.
Added a temporary TypeScript harness bridge used by src/extension-entry.ts until the full harness adapter is migrated in T007.

T003.redEvidence: Updated focused workflow tests to import the expected .ts state/task modules; node --test tests/phase-completion.test.js tests/phase-transitions.test.js tests/session-handoff-state.test.js tests/task-status-updater.test.js failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before the modules were renamed.
changes: Renamed src/phases, src/state, and src/tasks workflow modules from .js to .ts.
Added explicit workflow, phase, transition, handoff, gate-result, and implementation-status types for the migrated modules.
Updated runtime and test imports that depend on phase, state, and task-status modules to explicit .ts specifiers.
Preserved phase markers, harden approval status, transition behavior, session handoff status values, and task completion behavior.

T004.redEvidence: Updated artifact path, phase prompt builder, and session handoff summary tests to import the expected .ts modules; node --test tests/artifact-paths.test.js tests/phase-prompt-builder.test.js tests/session-handoff-summary.test.js failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before the modules were renamed.
changes: Renamed src/artifacts/*.js and src/prompts/*.js to .ts and updated runtime/test imports to explicit .ts specifiers.
Added TypeScript types for artifact references, handoff summary state, artifact inventory limits/records, explicit current artifacts, prompt builder inputs, and prompt/transition helpers.

Preserved docs artifact path naming, feature sanitization, prompt artifact ordering, untrusted excerpt labeling, bounded excerpt budgets, binary detection, outside-workspace checks, and symlink escape safeguards.
Tightened WorkflowState artifact typing to recorded string paths and kept optional implementation status context available to handoff summaries.

T005.redEvidence: Updated gate/model focused tests to import the expected .ts modules; node --test tests/gate-config-loader.test.js tests/gate-runner.test.js tests/model-config-loader.test.js tests/phase-model-resolver.test.js failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before the modules were renamed.
changes: Renamed src/gates/*.js and src/models/*.js to .ts and updated runtime/test imports to explicit .ts specifiers.
Added explicit TypeScript types for gate configs, gate definitions, gate execution/results, runner options, model configs, model references, and phase model resolution inputs.
Changed gate and model validators to accept unknown inputs and narrow JSON/config shapes while preserving existing validation messages and fallback behavior.
Preserved required/optional gate blocking semantics, gate result fields, model reference parsing, and phase/default model fallback behavior.

T006.redEvidence: Updated tests/workflow-progress-view.test.js to import ../src/tui/workflow-progress-view.ts; node --test tests/workflow-progress-view.test.js failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before the TUI modules were renamed.
changes: Renamed src/tui/calm-terminal-palette.js, src/tui/gate-status-view.js, and src/tui/workflow-progress-view.js to .ts.
Updated TUI and dependent harness imports to explicit .ts specifiers.
Added explicit TypeScript types for palette color names, gate status rows/options, workflow progress state, transitions, handoff display data, active model options, and rendering helpers.

Preserved visible widget labels, ordering, control-character sanitization, harden approval instructions, loopback display, handoff details, model truncation, ANSI color behavior, and gate status text.

T007.redEvidence: Updated harness-focused tests to import ../src/harness/*.ts modules; node --test tests/pi-harness-adapter.test.js tests/pi-state-persistence.test.js tests/pi-session-handoff.test.js failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before the harness modules were renamed.
changes: Renamed src/harness/*.js modules to .ts and updated harness tests plus internal harness imports to explicit .ts specifiers.
Removed the temporary TypeScript harness adapter bridge and pointed src/extension-entry.ts directly at the migrated TypeScript adapter.
Added narrow local TypeScript interfaces for the Pi API, context, session manager, UI, commands, tools, and tool results used by RalphWorks.

Typed the command handler, tool handlers, state persistence, session handoff orchestration, gate runner bridge, model routing, TUI updater, argument parser, and tool result helpers while preserving command/tool names and workflow behavior.

Preserved marker handling, harden approval pause, optional HTML approval, required gate blocking, model routing, TUI updates, notifications, replacement-session handoff behavior, and persisted state semantics.

T008.redEvidence: A repository checklist command failed before migration because the expected tests/*.test.ts, tests/*.e2e.test.ts, and tests/fixtures/scripted-pi-provider.ts counterparts did not exist.
changes: Renamed every first-party test under tests/ from .js to .ts, including the opt-in real-Pi e2e test.
Renamed tests/fixtures/scripted-pi-provider.js to tests/fixtures/scripted-pi-provider.ts and updated real-Pi e2e fixture extension paths to the .ts file.
Added strict TypeScript annotations and narrow local test helper types so the migrated tests, fixtures, and skipped e2e coverage are included in tsc --noEmit.
Updated npm test to run the TypeScript test files explicitly and updated npm run test:e2e:pi to target the migrated .e2e.test.ts path.
Added a narrow local declaration for the external @earendil-works/pi-ai fixture helper used by the scripted provider during type checking.
validation: node --input-type=module <one-to-one TypeScript test counterpart checklist> (failed before rename)
node --input-type=module <one-to-one TypeScript test counterpart checklist> (passed after rename)

T009.redEvidence: Added tests/repository-invariants.test.ts before its helper existed; node --test tests/repository-invariants.test.ts failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for tests/repository-invariant-checks.ts.
changes: Added tests/repository-invariants.test.ts to cover migration invariants in the normal tests/*.test.ts suite.
Added tests/repository-invariant-checks.ts to discover first-party repository files while excluding node_modules, dist, coverage, docs, and .git content.
The invariant now fails on existing first-party .js, .mjs, or .cjs files outside generated/external directories.

The invariant parses TypeScript files with the TypeScript compiler API and fails on actual local relative import/export/dynamic/type import specifiers ending in .js without flagging comments, strings, docs artifacts, or external package imports.
Kept the existing jiti entrypoint smoke test in tests/entrypoint-load.test.ts covered by the npm test TypeScript glob.

T010.redEvidence: Added tests/package-validation-contract.test.ts; node --test tests/package-validation-contract.test.ts failed because tsconfig.json did not include root TypeScript support files with the *.ts include pattern.
changes: Added a package validation contract test covering final TypeScript-oriented npm scripts, TypeScript test path targets, Biome helper scripts, strict source-run compiler options, and tsconfig include/exclude coverage.
Expanded tsconfig.json include entries to cover root TypeScript support files with *.ts while retaining the explicit index.ts, src/**/*.ts, and tests/**/*.ts coverage.
Verified npm test runs typecheck before explicit TypeScript test globs and npm run check runs typecheck before Biome checks.
validation: node --test tests/package-validation-contract.test.ts (failed before tsconfig include update)

T011.redEvidence: Updated tests/documentation-wording.test.ts to require TypeScript source-run guidance and stale JavaScript guidance removal; node --test tests/documentation-wording.test.ts failed before README.md and AGENTS.md were updated.
changes: Documented that RalphWorks ships and runs as TypeScript source through ./index.ts without a build step or committed JavaScript output.
Updated README.md test and development-check sections to mention Node >=22.22.2, npm run typecheck, explicit TypeScript node --test globs, and the opt-in real Pi e2e command.
Updated AGENTS.md focused test examples from deleted .js paths to .ts node --test commands.
Removed stale AGENTS.md guidance about keeping a JavaScript extension-entry wrapper aligned and replaced compaction wording with fresh Pi session handoff/session handoff summary wording.
Added documentation wording assertions so stale first-party .js test examples or extension-entry wrapper guidance fail in the future.

T012.redEvidence: Used the repository invariant tests and existing behavior tests as the final audit safety net; no new behavior drift failures were found during the T012 audit.
changes: Ran final repository scans for existing first-party .js, .mjs, and .cjs files outside generated/external directories; no files were reported.
Ran final scans for local relative .js import specifiers in TypeScript source; no specifiers were reported.
Verified package-script and tsconfig invariants, jiti entrypoint loading, and source-run TypeScript behavior through focused tests.
Ran focused high-risk behavior tests for harness handoff/persistence, gate/model config, TUI rendering, phase transitions, and the real-Pi e2e file in skipped mode.
Confirmed package metadata and package-lock synchronization with a dry-run package-lock-only install and found no required lockfile changes.
validation: node --test tests/pi-harness-adapter.test.ts tests/pi-session-handoff.test.ts tests/pi-state-persistence.test.ts tests/gate-config-loader.test.ts tests/gate-runner.test.ts tests/model-config-loader.test.ts tests/phase-model-resolver.test.ts tests/workflow-progress-view.test.ts tests/phase-transitions.test.ts tests/pi-real-session-handoff.e2e.test.ts

T013.redEvidence: Review-required opt-in validation failed before the fix: npm run test:e2e:pi timed out after red_team because the replacement-session agent_end context could not create the next handoff and reported "RalphWorks session handoff requires an active Pi command context." Added a focused harness regression for replacement event contexts without ctx.newSession.
changes: Moved retained session-control contexts into a process-global registry so Pi replacement extension instances can find the command-capable replacement context created by ctx.newSession.withSession.

Changed remembered session-control lookup to combine the current event context with the retained replacement newSession function, preserving the current session file as the parent for subsequent handoffs.
Added a harness regression proving a replacement phase completion can create the next handoff even when the event context lacks ctx.newSession.
Preserved the existing failure behavior when no command-capable context has ever been captured for a pending handoff.
validation: node --test --test-name-pattern "replacement phase completion reuses replacement session control when event ctx lacks newSession" tests/pi-harness-adapter.test.ts
